introSection: Jungle Trailblazer is a wooden roller coaster located at Oriental Heritage in Cixi, Ningbo, Zhejiang, China.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 2 trains with 12 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 24 riders per train. Trains built by Gravitykraft Corporation.

fullText:
Jungle Trailblazer is a wooden roller coaster located at Oriental Heritage in Cixi, Ningbo, Zhejiang, China.



2 trains with 12 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 24 riders per train. Trains built by Gravitykraft Corporation.
